text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Twinkle Series over, Seiun Sky has
managed to get some terrific results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And as for Seiun Sky herself...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nnn... Can't... run anymore...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Sky!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're supposed to train with me today! Wake up
this instant!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: SKY!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-Sei! Come on, wake up!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... I can't... hear you... Done for the day...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, dear. Evidently, she's faking it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That's a scary face you're makin', Grass!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Sky's trainer! Don't just stand there staring into
space! Do something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess I can't let Seiun Sky weasel her way out of
training like this...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sweeten the deal.
choice_data_list: No limits on bait and extra tackle rentals!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Geeez, you always know just how to reel me in,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: How did that wake her up?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Just what are you two playing at? Are you always
bargaining with one another like this?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Bargaining?! Nooo, we're just playing around is
all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, now it's clear. These are simply jests
between a peerless trickster and her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha! Peerless? You're giving me too much
credit there.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Trying to reel each other in back and forth can
get boring if it's the same ol' story.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And I'm always just looking to have fun. Right,
Trainer? ♪
